claim_summary: Registry includes dope-query, dope-memory, redis, qdrant, dopecon-bridge, adhd-engine as memory-adjacent core services.
Dope-Memory canonical schema defines raw, curated, reflection, issue-links, trajectory tables.
Chronicle store uses SQLite WAL and initializes schema from SQL file.
Deterministic search ordering and cursor logic are implemented in work log search.
MCP server enforces Top-K boundary and scope-hashed cursor validation.
MCP memory_search clamps top_k within deterministic ADHD boundary.
Dope-Memory redactor enforces sensitive key dropping, regex replacement, and size caps.
Promotion engine promotable event set and deterministic importance mapping are hard-coded.
EventBus consumer ingests activity.events.v1 and emits memory.derived.v1.
EventBus consumer processes stream via consumer groups with ack/retry behavior.
Event processing path: redact -> raw insert -> promotion -> derived publish.
Dope-Memory emits pulse/reflection derived events and handles idle/session-end boundaries.
Dope-Memory performs optional best-effort DopeContext indexing for promoted entries.
Dope-Memory HTTP service exposes /health and tool endpoints under /tools/*.
Dope-Memory runtime can start EventBus consumer, retention job, and Postgres mirror sync.
Dopecon-bridge EventBus defines event types and Redis stream publish/subscribe semantics.
Dopecon-bridge EventBus supports deduplication, cache, rate limiting, and monitoring toggles.
Dopecon-bridge consumer-group subscribe path includes xreadgroup and xack acknowledgment.
Dopecon-bridge startup initializes ConPort and EventBus, then starts DDG ingestion task.
Dopecon-bridge includes ConPort middleware for request hydration and delta persistence via X-Context-Token.
Dopecon-bridge exposes event publish/stream/history endpoints for cross-service coordination.
Cross-plane routing publishes coordination events to dopemux:cross-plane stream.
ConPort bridge event schemas use dotted event names (decision.logged, progress.updated).
Profile model requires conport in all profiles as memory authority.
Python-ML profile config explicitly separates shared ConPort DB and local context DBs.
Router config defines explicit routes for default/background/think/webSearch channels.
Task-orchestrator adapter reads ADHD state from ConPort active context.
Dope-context server includes MCP service discovery and ADHD dynamic top-k integration.
Dope-context has ADHD-aware dynamic result limits fallback behavior.
Dope-context search uses hybrid BM25+dense with RRF fusion and weighted final ranking.
Dope-Memory spec defines non-duplication, strict redaction, deterministic outputs, and Top-3 defaults.
Dope-Memory architecture spec defines activity.events.v1 and memory.derived.v1 and deterministic ordering.
Dope-Memory Postgres mirror model defines dm_* tables and summary_tsv indexed keyword surface.
Dope-Memory retrieval spec mandates deterministic ranking and scope-hashed cursor validation.
Dope-Memory MCP contracts enforce Top-3 default and deterministic recap behavior without LLM for Phase 1 recap.
Registry drift evidence: dope-context and other memory-adjacent directories exist in services listing.
Claude-mem docs define lifecycle sequence and per-stage flow.
Claude-mem docs define fire-and-forget hooks and worker-side processing model.
Claude-mem hooks.json maps lifecycle hooks to script commands.
Claude-mem ProcessManager uses Bun worker wrapper with health/start/restart controls.
Claude-mem Server defines worker HTTP routes including health, stream, and search endpoints.
Claude-mem database architecture docs list core tables and FTS5 structure.
Claude-mem migrations define FTS tables/triggers and query escaping behavior.
Claude-mem migration query builder escapes double quotes in search string.
Claude-mem search architecture defines 3-layer workflow for token-efficient retrieval.
Claude-mem progressive disclosure docs explicitly describe index-first then selective fetch design.
Claude-mem private-tags docs define storage exclusion behavior and edge cases.
Claude-mem MCP server source includes private-tag stripping and validation functions.
Claude-mem configuration docs include context knobs (observations count, context settings).
Claude-mem context loader and builder code apply typed context configuration fields.
Claude-mem Cursor integration uses generated rules and installer-managed setup.
A centralized lane registry/policy file does not appear in current Dopemux evidence set; lane behavior appears service-local.
Memory-related service ownership/production status for claude_brain/intelligence/session-intelligence is unresolved.
Local clone of claude-mem repo was not possible from shell due DNS resolution limits.
